message.content:
# Note Counter Pro App Screenshot Analysis

## Overall Layout & Structure
The app features a dark green/black background with a vertical layout organized into distinct sections. The interface is divided into:
- Top header with user info and navigation tabs
- Main counter section with currency denominations
- Bottom action buttons and status bar

## Currency & Denominations
The app uses **Indian Rupees (₹)** with the following denominations displayed:
- ₹500 (green Mahatma Gandhi note)
- ₹200 (orange Mahatma Gandhi note)
- ₹100 (purple Mahatma Gandhi note)
- ₹50 (light blue Mahatma Gandhi note)
- ₹20 (yellow Mahatma Gandhi note)
- ₹10 (brown Mahatma Gandhi note)
- ₹5 (green Mahatma Gandhi note)
- ₹2 (orange/red note)
- ₹1 (purple/blue note)

Each denomination has:
- High-quality currency image
- Denomination value
- Counter input field (showing "0")
- "=" sign
- Total value display (showing "0")
- + and - buttons for incrementing/decrementing

## UI Elements & Buttons

### Top Header
- **User Info**: "Lokhnath Technical" with email "titundas43@gmail.com" and verification checkmark
- **"Make Card"** button with profile icon
- **Navigation Tabs**: BILLING, CALC, COUNTER (active), KHATA

### Main Counter Section
- **Input Field**: "Enter Amount to Tally Payer" with yellow background
- **Denomination Rows**: Each with currency image, value, counter input, and total display
- **"other plus ₹"** button for additional amounts
- **"online Amount"** field with + and - buttons

### Action Buttons (Bottom)
- **Save Out** (dark red)
- **View Entry** (dark green)
- **Save In** (dark green)
- **Up/Down arrows** (navigation)
- **Receipt** (share icon)
- **Income - Expense** (central button)
- **Diary** (notebook icon)

### Status Bar
- Time: 15:35:05
- Battery: 43%
- Network: 5G
- Various status icons

## Special Features & Menu Options
A dropdown menu is visible with the following options:
- **Share Entry (Image)** (document icon)
- **Share Entry (PDF)** (PDF icon)
- **Share Entry (Text)** (WhatsApp icon)
- **Take Screenshot** (camera icon)
- **Copy Entry Details** (copy icon)
- **Bank Holidays** (bank icon)
- **Settings** (gear icon)
- **Language (हिन्दी)** (globe icon)
- **Give 5 Star** (star icon)

## Additional Fields
- **Category, Remark, टिप्पणी** (pen icon)
- **Person Name** (user icon)
- **Mobile Number** (phone icon)

## Color Scheme
- **Background**: Dark green/black
- **Active Tab**: Black with white text
- **Inactive Tabs**: Teal text
- **Input Fields**: White with black text
- **Total Displays**: Yellow background with black text
- **Action Buttons**: Dark green, dark red, and yellow
- **Menu**: White background with colored icons

## Functionality
The app appears to be a comprehensive money counting and accounting tool with:
- Manual note counting with visual currency representations
- Multiple sharing options (image, PDF, text)
- Entry saving capabilities (Save In/Out)
- Receipt generation
- Income/expense tracking
- Multi-language support (Hindi visible)
- Bank holiday information
- Custom category and remark fields
- Person and contact information storage

The interface is designed for easy data entry with large, clear buttons and visual currency representations to assist with accurate counting.
